MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Plaintiff Frances Gouvea's application for the pro hac vice admission of Craig Nichols is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org; Dept. 302.
